name: Sanitar Co., Ltd.
summary: Sanitar Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells ceramic sanitary products in Taiwan. It offers faucets, acrylic bathtubs, and bathroom cabinets, as well as sinks, toilets, urinals, and accessories. The company was formerly known as Sanken Industrial Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Sanitar Co., Ltd. in 2003. Sanitar Co., Ltd. was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
